hero.eyebrow: University of Energy & Natural Resources · Sunyani
hero.subtitle: Jobs, scholarships, mentors, and the kind of warm introductions that change careers — all in one place. Built by UENR, for UENR students and alumni around the world.

featuredAlumni.name: Kwame Mensah
featuredAlumni.quote: UENR gave me the field experience. This network gave me the people. Seven of my closest collaborators today sat next to me in Sunyani.

featuredAlumni.name: Abena Boateng
featuredAlumni.programme: BSc Renewable Energy Engineering · Class of 2020
featuredAlumni.quote: The mentor I matched with here reviewed every rejection email I got until one turned into my first offer. Six months later I was running the project.

featuredAlumni.name: Kofi Asante
featuredAlumni.quote: I used to apply to 40 jobs a week and hear nothing. Three applications through this board — three interviews, two offers. The difference is being referred.

featuredAlumni.name: Ama Owusu
featuredAlumni.quote: I give back now because someone older than me answered my Sunday-night panic emails in 2017. This is how the chain keeps going.

paragraphs: Every year, hundreds of brilliant UENR graduates enter a job market where the game is already being played by people with connections they don't have. Warm intros. Insider referrals. A senior who actually answers the message.

This platform is the answer — a place where the alumni already in the room open the door for the students still knocking. No paywall. No gatekeeping. Just Ghana's next generation of engineers, analysts, and builders helping each other up.
story.highlightLabel: of active users hear back within 2 weeks

facts.label: Jobs posted in the last year

cta.subtitle: Free for every UENR student and alumnus. No subscriptions, no upsells — just the people and opportunities you should have had access to from day one.
